{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Hotel Waiter / Waitress",
  "description": "Hotel Capitol is a modern and contemporary hotel that offers not only luxury but comfort at its best. The three-star hotel is strategically located at the heart of Omole Phase 1, making it easily accessible with excellent road networks to other parts of the mainland and the city of Lagos as a whole. The 32-room Hotel offers tastefully furnished deluxe executive and super executive rooms as well as one- and two-bedroom luxury suites.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Hotel Waiter / Waitress

Job Location:&nbsp;Berger, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Handles guests&rsquo; bills and invoices in a good quality service manner.
	Maintains the cleanliness and service supply at the service station to ensure prompt and effective operation.
	To be familiar with all food and beverage items on the outlet menu.
	To prepare the outlet for operation, including setting and resetting tables, light cleaning, and other assigned tasks.
	To take food and beverage orders from guests, upselling wherever possible.
	To utilize the outlet point-of-sales system as prescribed
	To ensure that all sales are properly recorded, follow the prescribed procedures for ordering, voiding, or correcting items.
	To serve food and beverages according to the standards established.
	To clear tables and remove dirty dishes to the dish area.
	To complete opening and closing duties as assigned.
	To be flexible wherever possible in meeting special requests from guests for specific food and beverage preparation methods and ingredients.
	To follow the presentation guidelines as established by the Management
	Serves food and beverages to guests according to prescribed service standards and procedures of room service with emphasis on speed and accuracy.
	Reports to the Restaurant Supervisor at the start of the shift to receive necessary instructions for the shift, side duties assigned, floor assignment, menu changes, guest comments, and complaints.
	Accomplishes and forwards the captain&#39;s order slip to the kitchen for orders of food and for drinks to the supervisor, or does so efficiently and correctly.
	Familiarize with all food and beverage items in the menu, items on promotions and daily special menu, their ingredients, method of preparation, portion size, and presentation to be able to deliver ideal service maximizing guest satisfaction.


Requirements


	Candidates should possess a minimum of an SSCE
	Candidates should reside within the Akute, Ojodu, Ikeja, Agege, Ogba, and Iyana Ipaja axis.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Intrested and qualified candidates&nbsp;should send their CV to:&nbsp;hrteam@hotelcapitol.com.ng&nbsp;using the Job Position as subject of the mail.",
  "datePosted": "2026-04-29",
  "validThrough": "2026-05-08",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Hotel Capitol"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",
    "address": {
      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",
       "addressRegion": ". ",
       "streetAddress": ". ",
      "addressLocality": "Lagos",
      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },
  "identifier": {
    "@type": "PropertyValue",
    "name": "",
    "value": "198138"
  },
  "baseSalary": {
    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",
    "currency": "NGN",
    "value": {
      "@type": "QuantitativeValue",
      "minValue": 0,
      "maxValue": 0,
      "unitText": "MONTH"
    }
  }
}



Hotel Waiter / Waitress Job at Hotel Capitol




        
    

        
        Hotel Capitol is a modern and contemporary hotel that offers not only luxury but comfort at its best. The three-star hotel is strategically located at the heart of Omole Phase 1, making it easily accessible with excellent road networks to other parts of the mainland and the city of Lagos as a whole. The 32-room Hotel offers tastefully furnished deluxe executive and super executive rooms as well as one- and two-bedroom luxury suites.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Hotel Waiter / Waitress

Job Location: Berger, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Handles guests’ bills and invoices in a good quality service manner.
	Maintains the cleanliness and service supply at the service station to ensure prompt and effective operation.
	To be familiar with all food and beverage items on the outlet menu.
	To prepare the outlet for operation, including setting and resetting tables, light cleaning, and other assigned tasks.
	To take food and beverage orders from guests, upselling wherever possible.
	To utilize the outlet point-of-sales system as prescribed
	To ensure that all sales are properly recorded, follow the prescribed procedures for ordering, voiding, or correcting items.
	To serve food and beverages according to the standards established.
	To clear tables and remove dirty dishes to the dish area.
	To complete opening and closing duties as assigned.
	To be flexible wherever possible in meeting special requests from guests for specific food and beverage preparation methods and ingredients.
	To follow the presentation guidelines as established by the Management
	Serves food and beverages to guests according to prescribed service standards and procedures of room service with emphasis on speed and accuracy.
	Reports to the Restaurant Supervisor at the start of the shift to receive necessary instructions for the shift, side duties assigned, floor assignment, menu changes, guest comments, and complaints.
	Accomplishes and forwards the captain's order slip to the kitchen for orders of food and for drinks to the supervisor, or does so efficiently and correctly.
	Familiarize with all food and beverage items in the menu, items on promotions and daily special menu, their ingredients, method of preparation, portion size, and presentation to be able to deliver ideal service maximizing guest satisfaction.


Requirements


	Candidates should possess a minimum of an SSCE
	Candidates should reside within the Akute, Ojodu, Ikeja, Agege, Ogba, and Iyana Ipaja axis.


Method of Application 
Intrested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Quality Control Officer Job at Workforce Group

Job Position: Quality Control Officer

	The ideal candidate will support the business in their respective area of employment.


Salary
N180,000 per month. 

Note: Candidate must be a resident of Lagos.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Account Officer",
  "description": "Adkan Service Nigeria Limited is a wholly indigenous construction company with a bias of undertaking construction projects essentially within the country. The reason for this nationalistic and patriotic bent is to join hands with others of like minds in other specialised fields in making Nigeria not only the pride of other nations but a reference point in Architectural designs and brilliantly executed construction projects. In furtherance of this mission statement, it is worth stating that all our completed projects can stand the test of time and can also compete favourably with similar projects elsewhere in the world.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Account Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are seeking a highly skilled and detail-oriented Account Officer to join our finance team in Abuja. The ideal candidate will be responsible for managing financial records, ensuring compliance with accounting standards, and supporting overall financial operations.
	This role requires strong analytical skills, integrity, and the ability to work in a fast-paced environment.


Key Responsibilities


	Prepare and maintain accurate financial records, reports, and statements
	Manage accounts payable and receivable processes
	Reconcile bank statements and monitor cash flow
	Assist in budget preparation and financial forecasting
	Prepare payroll schedules and ensure timely disbursement
	Ensure compliance with tax regulations, statutory requirements, and company policies
	Handle invoicing, expense tracking, and financial documentation
	Support internal and external audits
	Maintain proper filing systems for financial documents (digital and physical)
	Liaise with vendors, clients, and financial institutions when necessary


Requirements &amp; Qualifications


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related field
	Minimum of 5 years of proven experience as an Account Officer or in a similar role
	Professional certification (e.g., ICAN, ACCA) is an added advantage
	Strong knowledge of accounting principles and financial regulations
	Proficiency in accounting software (e.g., QuickBooks, Excel, Wave, or similar tools)
	Excellent analytical, organizational, and problem-solving skills
	High level of accuracy and attention to detail
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills
	Ability to work independently and meet deadlines


Key Competencies:


	Financial reporting and analysis
	Time management and organization
	Integrity and confidentiality
	Problem-solving mindset
	Attention to detail


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Cover Letter to:&nbsp;adkangroupjobs@gmail.com&nbsp;using &quot;Application for Account Officer &ndash; Abuja&quot; as the subject of the email.",

Account Officer Job at Adkan Service Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        Adkan Service Nigeria Limited is a wholly indigenous construction company with a bias of undertaking construction projects essentially within the country. The reason for this nationalistic and patriotic bent is to join hands with others of like minds in other specialised fields in making Nigeria not only the pride of other nations but a reference point in Architectural designs and brilliantly executed construction projects. In furtherance of this mission statement, it is worth stating that all our completed projects can stand the test of time and can also compete favourably with similar projects elsewhere in the world.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Account Officer
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are seeking a highly skilled and detail-oriented Account Officer to join our finance team in Abuja. The ideal candidate will be responsible for managing financial records, ensuring compliance with accounting standards, and supporting overall financial operations.
	This role requires strong analytical skills, integrity, and the ability to work in a fast-paced environment.


Key Responsibilities


	Prepare and maintain accurate financial records, reports, and statements
	Manage accounts payable and receivable processes
	Reconcile bank statements and monitor cash flow
	Assist in budget preparation and financial forecasting
	Prepare payroll schedules and ensure timely disbursement
	Ensure compliance with tax regulations, statutory requirements, and company policies
	Handle invoicing, expense tracking, and financial documentation
	Support internal and external audits
	Maintain proper filing systems for financial documents (digital and physical)
	Liaise with vendors, clients, and financial institutions when necessary


Requirements & Qualifications


	Bachelor’s Degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related field
	Minimum of 5 years of proven experience as an Account Officer or in a similar role
	Professional certification (e.g., ICAN, ACCA) is an added advantage
	Strong knowledge of accounting principles and financial regulations
	Proficiency in accounting software (e.g., QuickBooks, Excel, Wave, or similar tools)
	Excellent analytical, organizational, and problem-solving skills
	High level of accuracy and attention to detail
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills
	Ability to work independently and meet deadlines


Key Competencies:


	Financial reporting and analysis
	Time management and organization
	Integrity and confidentiality
	Problem-solving mindset
	Attention to detail


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Cover Letter to: [email protected] using "Application for Account Officer – Abuja" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Senior Business Development Analyst",
  "description": "Tailored Talent is recruiting suitably qualified candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior Business Development Analyst
Job Location:&nbsp;Abuja (FCT)&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Overview


	We are seeking a strategic, analytical, and impact-driven Business Development Analyst / Business Analyst who thrives at the intersection of data, strategy, operations, growth, and stakeholder engagement.
	This role is critical to client&rsquo;s mission. The successful candidate will evaluate business processes, analyse project and operational data, identify growth and efficiency opportunities, support donor and funder pipeline development, and generate actionable insights that improve performance, accountability, and measurable impact.
	You will help leadership make informed decisions, optimize operations, strengthen partnerships, and scale initiatives that deliver real outcomes across Africa.


Key Responsibilities
Business Analysis &amp; Process Improvement:


	Assess current business processes, workflows, and operational systems to identify inefficiencies
	Gather, document, and validate business requirements from internal and external stakeholders
	Recommend process improvements that enhance efficiency, transparency, accountability, and outcomes
	Support development of frameworks that improve organisational effectiveness
	Map workflows and implement systems for scalable growth


Data Analysis &amp; Reporting:


	Collect, clean, interpret, and analyse data related to projects, funding performance, partnerships, and operations
	Develop dashboards, scorecards, and management reports
	Track KPIs across strategic initiatives and funded programmes
	Present findings in clear, structured, decision-ready formats
	Build insights that improve funding allocation and execution quality.


Business Development &amp; Growth Strategy:


	Research donor markets, CSR funds, foundations, DFIs, NGOs, governments, and private sector funding opportunities
	Identify, qualify, and manage partnership pipelines
	Support proposal writing, partnership decks, fundraising materials, and presentations
	Analyse market opportunities for expansion into new sectors or countries
	Monitor competitor activity and ecosystem trends.


Strategic Planning &amp; Decision Support:


	Support leadership with business cases, scenario modelling, forecasting, and strategic planning
	Provide analytical support for budgeting and revenue planning
	Identify trends, risks, bottlenecks, and commercial opportunities
	Support launch of new products, services, or partnership models.


Stakeholder Engagement &amp; Collaboration:


	Work closely with project managers, leadership, and cross-functional teams to align business objectives with execution plans
	Facilitate stakeholder meetings, requirement-gathering sessions, and solution workshops
	Act as a liaison between business, technical,operational and project teams
	Ensure alignment of needs and solutions


Monitoring &amp; Evaluation Support:


	Assist in measuring project outcomes against funding objectives
	Track beneficiary reach, programme effectiveness, and social impact metrics
	Strengthen reporting systems for transparency and accountability
	Support evidence-based storytelling for donors and partners.


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	Qualified donor and partner opportunities generated
	Proposal conversion rate&bull; Process improvements implemented
	Dashboard and report delivery quality and timeliness
	Revenue and funding pipeline growth
	Project performance tracking accuracy
	Strategic recommendations adopted
	Stakeholder satisfaction.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Business Administration, Economics, Finance, Data Analytics, Project Management, International Development, or related field&bull;
	Minimum of 5 years relevant experience in business analysis, strategy, business development, consulting, operations, or analytical roles
	Strong proficiency in Excel, PowerPoint, Google Sheets, and reporting tools
	Experience with Power BI, Tableau, or similar BI tools is an advantage
	Strong business process mapping and requirement gathering experience
	Ability to convert data into strategic recommendations
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills
	Strong commercial awareness and structured thinking.


Preferred Qualifications:


	Professional certification in Business Analysis (e.g., CBAP, ECBA, PMI-PBA) is an advantage.
	Experience in consulting, development sector, NGO, fintech, startup, or project-based environments.
	Familiarity with project monitoring and evaluation frameworks.
	Experience using CRM, ERP, and workflow automation systems.
	Knowledge of donor ecosystems and African development markets.


Key Soft Skills:


	Strong analytical and critical thinking abilities
	Excellent communication and presentation skills
	High attention to detail and accuracy
	Problem-solving and solution-oriented mindset
	Strong stakeholder management and interpersonal skills
	Ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment
	Adaptability and proactive thinking
	High level of integrity and accountability.


What We Offer


	Compensation - Competitive Salary (N490,000 - N550,000 monthly)&nbsp;and benefits package in a collaborative and purpose-driven environment.
	Culture - Join a mission-driven organisation committed to measurable impact across Africa.
	Growth- Opportunities for continuous learning, development, and career progression.
	Impact- You will play a direct role in ensuring projects achieve intended outcomes and beneficiaries receive meaningful value.
",
  "datePosted": "2026-04-29",
  "validThrough": "2026-05-04",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

Senior Business Development Analyst Job at Tailored Talent




        
    

        
        Tailored Talent is recruiting suitably qualified candidates to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior Business Development Analyst
Job Location: Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Overview
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a strategic, analytical, and impact-driven Business Development Analyst / Business Analyst who thrives at the intersection of data, strategy, operations, growth, and stakeholder engagement.
	This role is critical to client’s mission. The successful candidate will evaluate business processes, analyse project and operational data, identify growth and efficiency opportunities, support donor and funder pipeline development, and generate actionable insights that improve performance, accountability, and measurable impact.
	You will help leadership make informed decisions, optimize operations, strengthen partnerships, and scale initiatives that deliver real outcomes across Africa.


Key Responsibilities
Business Analysis & Process Improvement:


	Assess current business processes, workflows, and operational systems to identify inefficiencies
	Gather, document, and validate business requirements from internal and external stakeholders
	Recommend process improvements that enhance efficiency, transparency, accountability, and outcomes
	Support development of frameworks that improve organisational effectiveness
	Map workflows and implement systems for scalable growth


Data Analysis & Reporting:


	Collect, clean, interpret, and analyse data related to projects, funding performance, partnerships, and operations
	Develop dashboards, scorecards, and management reports
	Track KPIs across strategic initiatives and funded programmes
	Present findings in clear, structured, decision-ready formats
	Build insights that improve funding allocation and execution quality.


Business Development & Growth Strategy:


	Research donor markets, CSR funds, foundations, DFIs, NGOs, governments, and private sector funding opportunities
	Identify, qualify, and manage partnership pipelines
	Support proposal writing, partnership decks, fundraising materials, and presentations
	Analyse market opportunities for expansion into new sectors or countries
	Monitor competitor activity and ecosystem trends.


Strategic Planning & Decision Support:


	Support leadership with business cases, scenario modelling, forecasting, and strategic planning
	Provide analytical support for budgeting and revenue planning
	Identify trends, risks, bottlenecks, and commercial opportunities
	Support launch of new products, services, or partnership models.


Stakeholder Engagement & Collaboration:


	Work closely with project managers, leadership, and cross-functional teams to align business objectives with execution plans
	Facilitate stakeholder meetings, requirement-gathering sessions, and solution workshops
	Act as a liaison between business, technical,operational and project teams
	Ensure alignment of needs and solutions


Monitoring & Evaluation Support:


	Assist in measuring project outcomes against funding objectives
	Track beneficiary reach, programme effectiveness, and social impact metrics
	Strengthen reporting systems for transparency and accountability
	Support evidence-based storytelling for donors and partners.


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	Qualified donor and partner opportunities generated
	Proposal conversion rate• Process improvements implemented
	Dashboard and report delivery quality and timeliness
	Revenue and funding pipeline growth
	Project performance tracking accuracy
	Strategic recommendations adopted
	Stakeholder satisfaction.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Economics, Finance, Data Analytics, Project Management, International Development, or related field•
	Minimum of 5 years relevant experience in business analysis, strategy, business development, consulting, operations, or analytical roles
	Strong proficiency in Excel, PowerPoint, Google Sheets, and reporting tools
	Experience with Power BI, Tableau, or similar BI tools is an advantage
	Strong business process mapping and requirement gathering experience
	Ability to convert data into strategic recommendations
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills
	Strong commercial awareness and structured thinking.


Preferred Qualifications:


	Professional certification in Business Analysis (e.g., CBAP, ECBA, PMI-PBA) is an advantage.
	Experience in consulting, development sector, NGO, fintech, startup, or project-based environments.
	Familiarity with project monitoring and evaluation frameworks.
	Experience using CRM, ERP, and workflow automation systems.
	Knowledge of donor ecosystems and African development markets.


Key Soft Skills:


	Strong analytical and critical thinking abilities
	Excellent communication and presentation skills
	High attention to detail and accuracy
	Problem-solving and solution-oriented mindset
	Strong stakeholder management and interpersonal skills
	Ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment
	Adaptability and proactive thinking
	High level of integrity and accountability.


What We Offer


	Compensation - Competitive Salary (N490,000 - N550,000 monthly) and benefits package in a collaborative and purpose-driven environment.
	Culture - Join a mission-driven organisation committed to measurable impact across Africa.
	Growth- Opportunities for continuous learning, development, and career progression.
	Impact- You will play a direct role in ensuring projects achieve intended outcomes and beneficiaries receive meaningful value.
